messages.content: In my neighborhood, they always claim to improve streets but then nothing changes. Just waiting again. Makes me wanna scream sometimes.
i know exactly what you mean. they dug up my street last year and we're still no new asphalt. feels like forever/waiting for something that might never happen. frustrating!
It’s infuriating. At least next time they could make it quick, you know? Same old same old here too. Hope things change soon though.
That anger, totally felt it this morning as I dodged potholes and tried not to curse out loud. They must really like digging up our lives. #endthenagivation地狱之火卡牌游戏助手
Same here. My wheels feel like they’re on eggshells every time I drive through these patches. Wish someone would come and fix it already. Frustrating!
Just finished my morning commute and it's another story of uneven roads. Time to check which part needs new tires. Ugh, when will this endless cycle end?
So true. Each drive now a mini-adventure in bumpiness. Got to change the engine light too, probably from all the shaking. This never ends.

Wanted to chime in as well. Last month, they were "improving" the road by closing it off entirely — still had potholes and old potholes turning into bigger ones. When are they gonna actually do their job instead of promising improvement? Disheartening.

Frustration city, all day long. Potholes making more than you'd think possible. Feels like an ongoing road repair marathon that leads nowhere. Hope actual progress comes soon before this drive gets physically taxing.
Exactly, David! Every turn brings another dose of old road. Their promises... nah, more patience lost than gained. Let’s hope something changes around here soon. Gosh, another rough weekend ahead.

Absolutely got me! Thought about joining a protest next but might just scream in my car instead. These delays feel like an annual event. I swear, this city is setup on a pothole factory. Has anyone’s commute been smooth today? If so, drop a friendly PM, I need something good to balance out all this awfulness.

Just felt the need to spit it out. Yet
对其真实感受写出回复。

            请遵循以下格式，只回复帖子内容，不添加其他任何文字或评论。

            
.Traci Ortmann
It’s infuriating. At least next time they could make it quick, you know? Same old same old here too. Hope things change soon though.
Totally agree. Takes patience and nerves, both in short supply lately. Here’s to hoping for smoother rides ahead.
Yeah, trying not to lose it every time. Got to plan alternate routes, or maybe just stick to walking forever. Let's hope they speed up this once.
Exactly, Traci. And every plan changes just when I thought I had a stable route. Here’s to hoping we get some sanity back on the roads.
Hopefully some day soon we won’t be bumping along anymore. Till then, keep your wits about you.
Agreed. Need a way to offset all this bumpiness, though not sure what works. Maybe we all share routes when things are less bumpy. Hoping smoother days aren't far off.
Sharing routes could definitely help ease the frustration. Maybe a small rebellion—ditch the cars for a day. Hoping this turns around soon.
Flinging a bike around won't solve the po, need something immediate. Hoping the solutions are quicker to appear than these potholes. Till then, sharing routes feels like the best we've got.
True words, Eugene. Until something drastic happens, sharing might just be the temporary fix. Hoping the real fixes come faster than the po-bump factory around here keeps churning out.
So true. Every so often we try to jump from car pool lanes but get stuck in pothole fields. Hope tomorrow brings some less bump than usual.

Totally feel you on that one! Whenever they start resurfacing roads and you think things will finally get better, they cancel work or delay everything by months. What did they plan to do with all those cones anyway?
